name: Peachtree Street Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a saucepan, breast side down, in 1-1/2 inches of water.
2. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes until the chicken is fork-tender.
3. Cool the chicken. Cut into bite-size pieces.
4. During this time, toast pecans at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. Pare peaches, if desired, and cut into 3/4-inch pieces.
6. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and brown sugar. Toss gently with the chicken, pecans, and peaches.
7. Serve on a bed of green leaf lettuce.
